title: [YTP] What it takes to be a *REAL* Mafioso
description:
Every wise guy eats a horse.

Follow me on Twitter! https://twitter.com/SirElliot24




Also, April Fools. Jerk.

Also, what's that? You like Tommy's tunes?....Well it's after April Fool's day now as I'm typing this so I'll give them to you.

1st song: "Carameldansen" - Caramel
2nd song: "Heartless" - A Day to Remember
3rd song: "Let Mom Sleep" - Hideki Naganuma
4th song: "E1M1" - SonicClang (was made for a Doom 3 mod that recaptures the original Doom)

What? You actually have a GOOD taste in music and only want Salieri's songs on the gramaphone? You're a beautiful human being.

1st song: "Out for No Good" - The Mills Brothers
2nd song: "Chinatown, my Chinatown" - The Mills Brothers
3rd song: "Belleville" - Django Reinhardt
4th song (barely hear one second of it): "You Run Your Mouth" - Louis Jordan
